chart_id.description: Unique identifier of this chart within the game (could be song ID + difficulty ID).

difficulty.description: Game-native difficulty name or code (e.g., 'Easy', 'Normal', 'Hard', 'Expert', 'Master', 'Append', or game-specific labels).

adapter_metadata.description: Metadata about the adapter and source asset.

adapter_version.description: Semantic version of the adapter implementation.

source_path.description: Optional logical path or URI of the source chart inside the game resources.

chart_meta.description: Global metadata needed for duration, BPM and time-signature related detections.

bpm.description: Base BPM of the chart. If there are BPM changes, this should be the primary or starting BPM.

max_time_beats.description: Time (in beats) of the last playable note. Used for duration calculations (e.g., duration>=2:30).

measure_markers.description: Optional list of measure boundary positions, used for time_signiture_shift detection.

items.description: Beat position where a measure starts.

bpm_changes.description: Optional BPM change events for bpm_shift/sudden_speedup/sudden_slowdown detection.

time_beats.description: Beat position where this BPM becomes active.

bpm.description: New BPM value starting at time_beats.

note_events.description: Flattened list of all gameplay-relevant note events in the chart, normalized to the canonical model.

time_beats.description: Position of this event in beats from chart start. Used for Δbeats, streams, bursts, rhythm difficulty.

lane.description: Normalized lane index (0-based or adapter-chosen convention). Used for jumps, stairs, trills, hand-crossing patterns.

kind.description: Canonical note kind derived from the source game.

extra.description: Optional additional geometry and semantic fields used by detectors.

width_lanes.description: Approximate width (in lane units) of this object; used for tiny_notes, tiny_hold, chord/visibility detection.

rect_height.description: Height or duration indicator for holds vs taps, if available.

direction.description: Direction of a flick (e.g., 'left', 'right', 'up', 'down', or game-specific labels) for difficult_directional_flick detection.

shape.description: Optional code for visual shape (e.g., 'trace', 'arc', 'straight', 'zigzag') used to detect trace_flick and low_visibility_trace.

raw_type.description: Original game-specific note type name (for debugging or future mappings).

sections.description: Optional section-level metrics (SectionMetrics) for this chart. If omitted, downstream pipeline may compute sections itself.

items.description: A single section's metrics. The exact schema is defined by proseka_internal_analysis_schema_v1.4.0.json.

diagnostics.description: Optional diagnostics or warnings produced by the adapter or validators (e.g., unsupported note types, approximations, parse errors). May also include aggregate metrics such as 'total_hold_coverage' or 'avg_nps' for QA dashboards.

canonical_sections_version.description: Optional version tag for the sections structure and SectionMetrics contract used in this payload (e.g., 'proseka_sectionmetrics_v1').

internal_metadata.description: Optional internal tracking metadata for ingestion and QA pipelines (e.g., run_id, validator_version, ingestion_timestamp). Not intended for end-user features.
